home_meta_description: Compare two audio samples, vote for the strongest option, and move from round to round with clarity.
home_intro: Listen to both clips in full, then vote once both playbacks are complete for the highest quality sample.
home_result_body: Reset the stage and move on when you're ready for the next comparison.
home_footnote: Voting unlocks only after both clips finish playing.
home_footnote_unavailable: Audio controls stay visible even when the matchup data is unavailable. Voting remains locked until audio loads correctly.
home_support_heading: You want to help the project thrive.
home_support_body: If you think the project is useful, you can support Audiology Arena on Tipeee.
scores_heading: See Elo scores by organisation, model, or voice.
scores_intro: Switch leaderboard grouping and language to inspect how the arena rankings evolve over time.
scores_empty_body: Record a few comparisons first, then come back here to inspect the Elo standings.
